title: Robust Crispy Mediterranean Lamb Skewers
description: A festive Mediterranean dish featuring lamb skewers with a crispy exterior and a winey, herby flavor, made with dill and shio-koji-cure for a macrobiotic-friendly twist.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together shio-koji, red wine, olive oil, garlic, lemon zest, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and toss to coat, then cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat, threading the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and grill for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the lamb is cooked through and crispy on the outside.
Sprinkle the chopped fresh dill over the skewers and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional dill and lemon wedges, if desired.
Serve with a side of roasted vegetables or quinoa for a complete meal.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
